records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew, what's left...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew, what's left...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew, what's left...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Christmas tree is up, the fireplace is lit, and it has enough firewood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Christmas tree is up, the fireplace is lit, and it has enough firewood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Christmas tree is up, the fireplace is lit, and it has enough firewood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the gifts for our guests are here, and...
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the gifts for our guests are here, and...
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the gifts for our guests are here, and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right! I can't believe I forgot about the roll sheet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right! I can't believe I forgot about the roll sheet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right! I can't believe I forgot about the roll sheet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today is Christmas, but it's also a day to celebrate Sister Looper's ordination...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today is Christmas, but it's also a day to celebrate Sister Looper's ordination...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today is Christmas, but it's also a day to celebrate Sister Looper's ordination...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I'm sure Sister Looper will be pleased to receive congratulatory messages from all the guests.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I'm sure Sister Looper will be pleased to receive congratulatory messages from all the guests.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I'm sure Sister Looper will be pleased to receive congratulatory messages from all the guests.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm! Okay, that should be all the decorations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm! Okay, that should be all the decorations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm! Okay, that should be all the decorations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Is there something outside...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Is there something outside...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Is there something outside...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's snowing...? And it's already piled up so much...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's snowing...? And it's already piled up so much...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's snowing...? And it's already piled up so much...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, snow...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, snow...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, snow...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is... a special, sweet dessert that you would share with your friends and family on a white Christmas night,
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is... a special, sweet dessert that you would share with your friends and family on a white Christmas night,
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is... a special, sweet dessert that you would share with your friends and family on a white Christmas night,

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...gathered around the fireplace as soft snowflakes fall outside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...gathered around the fireplace as soft snowflakes fall outside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...gathered around the fireplace as soft snowflakes fall outside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! A white Christmas!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! A white Christmas!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! A white Christmas!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, the Lord must be blessing tonight's Christmas party...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, the Lord must be blessing tonight's Christmas party...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, the Lord must be blessing tonight's Christmas party...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, merciful Lord...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, merciful Lord...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, merciful Lord...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please help everyone invited to the party create cherished memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please help everyone invited to the party create cherished memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please help everyone invited to the party create cherished memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please help the two Sisters become closer on this wonderful night.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please help the two Sisters become closer on this wonderful night.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please help the two Sisters become closer on this wonderful night.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lastly, please give me the strength to bake the perfect <color=#ffd34c>holy night chocolate mousse cake</color> for tonight's Christmas party.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lastly, please give me the strength to bake the perfect <color=#ffd34c>holy night chocolate mousse cake</color> for tonight's Christmas party.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lastly, please give me the strength to bake the perfect <color=#ffd34c>holy night chocolate mousse cake</color> for tonight's Christmas party.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the name of our Lord. I pray. Amen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the name of our Lord. I pray. Amen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the name of our Lord. I pray. Amen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, let's finish up before our guests start coming in...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, let's finish up before our guests start coming in...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, let's finish up before our guests start coming in...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to Ryan's chocolate mousse cake recipe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to Ryan's chocolate mousse cake recipe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to Ryan's chocolate mousse cake recipe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first thing I have to do is make the butter cream by mixing egg yolk, sugar, and melted butter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first thing I have to do is make the butter cream by mixing egg yolk, sugar, and melted butter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first thing I have to do is make the butter cream by mixing egg yolk, sugar, and melted butter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take the pre-cracked eggs I got from Ground One and mix it with the palm sugar that was extracted from Front Bay's palm trees...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take the pre-cracked eggs I got from Ground One and mix it with the palm sugar that was extracted from Front Bay's palm trees...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take the pre-cracked eggs I got from Ground One and mix it with the palm sugar that was extracted from Front Bay's palm trees...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here is the highest-quality processed butter I bought in Charade that I'll melt in the pan...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here is the highest-quality processed butter I bought in Charade that I'll melt in the pan...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here is the highest-quality processed butter I bought in Charade that I'll melt in the pan...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, if I mix in the gelatin powder I got from Strega with water...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, if I mix in the gelatin powder I got from Strega with water...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, if I mix in the gelatin powder I got from Strega with water...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The butter cream is complete!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The butter cream is complete!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The butter cream is complete!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...? I thought I heard a strange sound coming from the cream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...? I thought I heard a strange sound coming from the cream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...? I thought I heard a strange sound coming from the cream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? The cream is squirming. I should quickly mold it into the shape I need right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? The cream is squirming. I should quickly mold it into the shape I need right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? The cream is squirming. I should quickly mold it into the shape I need right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, next is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, next is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, next is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right! I should melt the Solocao chocolate that Professor Lee made!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right! I should melt the Solocao chocolate that Professor Lee made!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right! I should melt the Solocao chocolate that Professor Lee made!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Now, I'll mix in earl grey into the melted chocolate, then add the already-made butter cream...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Now, I'll mix in earl grey into the melted chocolate, then add the already-made butter cream...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Now, I'll mix in earl grey into the melted chocolate, then add the already-made butter cream...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it's done! The chocolate mousse cake!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it's done! The chocolate mousse cake!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it's done! The chocolate mousse cake!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grrrrrrrr...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grrrrrrrr...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grrrrrrrr...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Brother Chocolat! You shouldn't move just yet!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Brother Chocolat! You shouldn't move just yet!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Brother Chocolat! You shouldn't move just yet!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I haven't placed the cake sheet yet! And I also need to decorate you with Campamento's wild strawberries and whipped cream...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I haven't placed the cake sheet yet! And I also need to decorate you with Campamento's wild strawberries and whipped cream...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I haven't placed the cake sheet yet! And I also need to decorate you with Campamento's wild strawberries and whipped cream...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The mousse...! It's getting puffier...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: The mousse...! It's getting puffier...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grrrrrrrr...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grrrrrrrr...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grrrrrrrr...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Christmas... For a special Christmas...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Christmas... For a special Christmas...

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-brother Chocolat is talking...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? KYAAAAH...?!
